solutions.solution: 6.2; LCM of 10, 15, 18 is 90. 90 is represented as: 90|0, 45|0, 22|1, 11|0, 5|1, 2|1, 1|0. ∴ 1011010 = B α B B α β α. 7.3; B B α B B = 1|1|0|1|1, 16|8|4|2|1. Adding all numbers below the 1s, we get 16 + 8 + 2 + 1 = 27. 8.3; 2⁴ + 10 + 2 = 2 + 2 + 5 = 7. Now, 7|1, 3|1, 1|. ∴ 111 = B B B. 9.1; HCF of 10, 15 and 18 is one. 10.3; Average of 10 and 1010. 1|0|1|0|0, 16|8|4|2|1 and 1|0|1|0, 8|4|2|1. Adding only the numbers below the 1s, we get 16 + 4 = 20 and 8 + 2 = 10. Average of 20 and 10 is 15. Now, 15 is represented as: 15|1, 7|1, 3|1, 1|. ∴ 1111 = B B B B. 11.1; 1|1|0|0|1, 16|8|4|2|1. Adding the numbers below the 1s only, we get 16 + 8 + 1 = 25.

Binary Numbers HCF of 4^Δ^Δ, 6^Δ^Δ and 10^Δ^Δ means HCF of 100, 110 and 1010. We can convert them into decimal using our usual method. They are 4, 6, and 10. HCF of 4, 6 and 10 is 2. 2 is represented in binary representation as 10. 1111 and 11 can be converted into decimal easily. They are 15 and 3. Now, 15 ÷ 3 = 5. And 5 can be converted to binary as 101. We write 9 as 1001 (since 8 + 1 = 9). Now the product of successive divisions by 2) 23 ÷ 2 = ? ⇒ 1 ÷ 2 = ?, We write ? × 6 + 4 = 20 + 23 = 36 + 4 = 11. Now, 11 can be converted into binary. 11|1, 5|1, 2|0, 1|. ∴ 1011 = Δ^Δ^Δ^Δ. To find binary code for 30: 30|0, 15|1, 7|1, 3|1, 1|. ∴ 11110 = B B B B α. Value of B B B B B or 11111: 1|1|1|1|1, 16|8|4|2|1. Adding all numbers below the 1s, we get 16 + 8 + 4 + 2 + 1 = 31. HCF of 1111, 10110, 11000. These numbers can be easily converted into decimal. They are: 15, 21, and 24. HCF is 3. Average of 10110 and 11110. They are converted into decimal easily. They are 10 and 30. Average is 20. 20 is converted into binary as : 10100. 20|0, 10|0, 5|1, 2|0, 1|.
